LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL AWARD REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $687.50 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $540, FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $152,876.60. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL S. BROME OF THE WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD LAW FIRM,
TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will award reasonable attorneys fees in the amount of $687.50 and costs in the amount of $540, for a total award of $152,876.60. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
